plan.original_text: What would be the impact on PayPal's margins if the monetization of non-core assets is delayed beyond the next fiscal year?
plan.thesis: PayPal could rerate if management executes cost restructuring and monetizes non-core assets, triggering margin expansion. The thesis fails if active account growth stagnates.

steps.description: PYPL current net profit margin — fundamental.snapshot.profit_margin
PYPL earnings call transcripts for commentary on non-core asset monetization and margin impact — narrative.transcript.full
Assess the impact on PayPal's margins if the monetization of non-core assets is delayed beyond the next fiscal year, using current margins and management commentary.

ambiguity_notes.monetization of non-core assets: grounded via earnings call transcript text search, as there is no specific quantitative metric for non-core asset monetization timing
ambiguity_notes.margins: grounded to operating margin and net profit margin snapshots to capture both operational efficiency and below-the-line asset sale impacts

plan.reasoning: To determine the impact of delayed non-core asset monetization on PayPal's margins, we fetch the current operating and net profit margins as a baseline. We then retrieve the last year of earnings call transcripts to extract management's commentary on the expected margin contribution and timing of these asset sales, culminating in a qualitative assessment of the delay's impact.
